prompt:
You are implementing a Vue 3 registration form in a Turborepo monorepo.

## Task

Implement TWO files **in this order**:

1. `apps/web/src/registration/types/index.ts` — Zod schema + TypeScript type
2. `apps/web/src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue` — Vue SFC using the `elements` package

Write `types/index.ts` **first** so that RegistrationForm.vue can import from it.
Use `write_file` to write each file, then `run_compilation` to check for TypeScript errors.
`write_file` only writes the file and returns `"File written."` — it does NOT compile.
After each write, call `run_compilation` to get feedback and fix any errors before moving on.

**Use `query_rag` to look up component API examples before writing any code.** The tool has code examples for all available form components and patterns.

### Required fields

| Field       | Component             | Constraints                                                                 |
|-------------|----------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `username`  | ControlledInput       | required, min 3 chars                                                       |
| `email`     | ControlledInput       | type="email", required, valid email                                         |
| `role`      | ControlledRadioGroup  | options: "user", "admin", "contributor"                                    |
| `otherInfo` | ControlledInput       | visible only when `role === "contributor"`                                  |
| `newsletter`| ControlledCheckbox    |                                                                             |
| `frequency` | ControlledRadioGroup  | options: "daily", "weekly", "monthly"; visible only when `newsletter` true  |
| `bio`       | ControlledTextarea    | optional                                                                    |

### Conditional validation

Use Zod `.superRefine()` for cross-field rules:
- `otherInfo` required when `role === "contributor"`
- `frequency` required when `newsletter === true`

runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button, ControlledCheckbox, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormActions, FormFields } from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";
import {
  registrationSchema,
  type RegistrationFormValues,
} from "../types";

const { onSubmit } = defineProps<{
  onSubmit: (values: RegistrationFormValues) => Promise<RegistrationFormValues>;
}>();

const initialValues: RegistrationFormValues = {
  username: "",
  email: "",
  role: "user",
  otherInfo: "",
  newsletter: false,
  frequency: undefined,
  bio: "",
};

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
];

const actions = { onSubmit };
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="initialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{
      form,
      resetGeneralError
    }">
      <!-- username: required, min 3 chars -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Choose a username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- email: type="email", required -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="your@email.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- role: radio group with 3 options -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo: only visible when role === "contributor" -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Additional Information"
        placeholder="Provide any additional info..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- newsletter: checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- frequency: only visible when newsletter === true -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- bio: optional textarea -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{
      form,
      isValid
    }" class="mt-6">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

args.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button, ControlledCheckbox, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormActions, FormFields } from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";
import {
  registrationSchema,
  type RegistrationFormValues,
} from "@/registration/types";

const { onSubmit } = defineProps<{
  onSubmit: (values: RegistrationFormValues) => Promise<RegistrationFormValues>;
}>();

const initialValues: RegistrationFormValues = {
  username: "",
  email: "",
  role: "user",
  otherInfo: "",
  newsletter: false,
  frequency: undefined,
  bio: "",
};

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
];

const actions = { onSubmit };
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="initialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{
      form,
      resetGeneralError
    }">
      <!-- username: required, min 3 chars -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Choose a username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- email: type="email", required -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="your@email.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- role: radio group with 3 options -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo: only visible when role === "contributor" -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Additional Information"
        placeholder="Provide any additional info..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- newsletter: checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- frequency: only visible when newsletter === true -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- bio: optional textarea -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{
      form,
      isValid
    }" class="mt-6">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button, ControlledCheckbox, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormActions, FormFields } from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";
import {
  registrationSchema,
  type RegistrationFormValues,
} from "../types";

const { onSubmit } = defineProps<{
  onSubmit: (values: RegistrationFormValues) => Promise<RegistrationFormValues>;
}>();

const initialValues: RegistrationFormValues = {
  username: "",
  email: "",
  role: "user",
  otherInfo: "",
  newsletter: false,
  frequency: undefined,
  bio: "",
};

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
];

const actions = { onSubmit };
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="initialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{
      form,
      resetGeneralError
    }">
      <!-- username: required, min 3 chars -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Choose a username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- email: type="email", required -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="your@email.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- role: radio group with 3 options -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo: only visible when role === "contributor" -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Additional Information"
        placeholder="Provide any additional info..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- newsletter: checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- frequency: only visible when newsletter === true -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- bio: optional textarea -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{
      form,
      isValid
    }" class="mt-6">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

tool_call_log.args:
Both files have been successfully implemented:

1. `apps/web/src/registration/types/index.ts` - Contains Zod schema with:
   - `username`: required, min 3 characters
   - `email`: required, email validation
   - `role`: required, enum ["user", "admin", "contributor"]
   - `otherInfo`: optional, becomes required when role === "contributor" (via superRefine)
   - `newsletter`: optional boolean
   - `frequency`: optional, enum ["daily", "weekly", "monthly"], becomes required when newsletter === true (via superRefine)
   - `bio`: optional
   - Cross-field validation using `.superRefine()` for conditional requirements

2. `apps/web/src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue` - Vue SFC with:
   - All required components from "elements": ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledCheckbox, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormFields, FormActions, Button
   - ControlledInput for username and email (required)
   - ControlledRadioGroup for role with options [user, admin, contributor]
   - ControlledInput for otherInfo (visible only when role === "contributor")
   - ControlledCheckbox for newsletter
   - ControlledRadioGroup for frequency (visible only when newsletter is true) with options [daily, weekly, monthly]
   - ControlledTextarea for optional bio
   - Reactive visibility using FormFields slot's `form.values` for conditional rendering
   - @input-click handlers connected to resetGeneralError from FormFields
